name: ItemUsage
description: Represents a record of an item in a shared vault being accessed, modified, or used.

uuid.description: The unique identifier for the item usage record.

used_version.description: The version of the item that was used.

vault_uuid.description: The UUID of the vault containing the item.

item_uuid.description: The UUID of the item that was used.

action.description: The type of action performed on the item.
